query: SELECT ta.id, tm1.name as 'leadManagerId_name', tm1.teamRole as 'leadManagerId_role', tm2.name as 'acquisitionManagerId_name', tm2.teamRole as 'acquisitionManagerId_role' FROM team_assignments ta LEFT JOIN team_members tm1 ON ta.leadManagerId = tm1.id LEFT JOIN team_members tm2 ON ta.acquisitionManagerId = tm2.id ORDER BY ta.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT ta.id, tm1.name as 'leadManagerId_name', tm1.teamRole as 'leadManagerId_role', tm2.name as 'acquisitionManagerId_name', tm2.teamRole as 'acquisitionManagerId_role' FROM team_assignments ta LEFT JOIN team_members tm1 ON ta.leadManagerId = tm1.id LEFT JOIN team_members tm2 ON ta.acquisitionManagerId = tm2.id ORDER BY ta.id;
